description: Nextill is a simple and modern app designed to help you manage your till, menu, and stock in one place.
benefit: Stay organized and keep your daily operations under control with ease.
free: Nextill is completely free to use.

cta.signIn: Sign in to access your dashboard
cta.signUp: Create your free account and get started

features.title: Features
features.till: Manage your till and track daily transactions
features.menu: Create and update your menu items easily
features.stock: Monitor stock levels and stay in control
features.devices: Use it on desktop, tablet, and mobile

signUp.title: Create your Nextill account
signUp.name: Name
signUp.privacyConsent: I have read and agree to the
signUp.emailVerification: We’ll send a verification email to this address so you can recover your password later if needed.

forgotPssw.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPssw.description: Enter the email address you use to sign in. We’ll send you a reset link.
forgotPssw.label: Remembered it?

form.title: Check your inbox
form.description: If an account exists for that email, we sent a password reset link. Please also check your spam or junk folder.
form.label: Email
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.textBottom: Use the email linked to your account.
